# aaa.arif-fazil.com

## Purpose
The Governance Cockpit for the arifOS constellation. Used for monitoring agents, tools, and constitutional compliance.

## Canonical Pages
- /agents: Active agent cards and registries.
- /governance: The 13 Floors and Vault999 status.
- /webmcp: Browser-native MCP execution interface.
- /a2a: Agent-to-Agent protocol logs.

## Connection
Integrates with the mcp.arif-fazil.com kernel for real-time governance actions.
